rag_rules: Enclose AGREE contracts within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use component implementation annexes for assignments.
Timing properties (Period, Compute_Execution_time) are not directly usable as variables without explicit model ports or constants.
generic_rules: Use `assume` and `guarantee` to express requirements with labels.
Declare constants with `const name : type = value;`.
Define equations with `eq name : type = expression;`.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Ensure type consistency when defining equations (bool, int, real).
Use explicit Boolean expressions for Boolean ports; avoid integer conversions.
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to directly use AADL property names as AGREE variables without corresponding model elements.
Avoid range comparisons on non-numeric types (Boolean, enums).
